heading: Authorized strengths: commissioned officers in an active status
label: 12003 Authorized strengths: commissioned officers in an active status
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3217, 5414, and 8217 of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(a)(3)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The authorized strengths of the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps in reserve commissioned officers, other than commissioned warrant officers and officers on an active-duty list, in an active status are as follows: Army275,000Air Force200,000Navy150,000Marine Corps24,500.
the Secretary concerned determines that a greater number is necessary for planned mobilization requirements; or
the excess results directly from the operation of a nondiscretionary provision of law.
